content:
MODULE: cosmos.rag.context_compression
FILE: cosmos/rag/context_compression.py (589 lines)
CATEGORY: rag

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Context Compression - Intelligent Summarization and Token Optimization

Q1 2025 Feature: Context Compression
- Intelligent summarization of retrieved context
- Priority-based context allocation
- Token-efficient memory injection
- Hierarchical context compression

CLASSES:
- CompressionLevel(Enum): Levels of context compression.
- ContentPriority(Enum): Priority levels for content.
- ContextBlock: A block of context with metadata.
  Methods: def effective_score(self) -> float
- CompressionResult: Result of context compression.
- ContextBudget: Token budget for context injection.
  Methods: def available_tokens(self) -> int
- ContextCompressor: Intelligent context compression for token-efficient memory injection.

Features:
  Methods: def estimate_tokens(self, text: str) -> int
  Methods: async def compress_context(self, blocks: list[ContextBlock], budget: ContextBudget, compression_leve
  Methods: async def optimize_for_query(self, blocks: list[ContextBlock], query: str, budget: ContextBudget) ->
  Methods: def create_budget(self, total_tokens: int, system_prompt: Optional[str]=None, conversation: Optional
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> dict
